species.notes: Dromedary support is pinned to domestic-dromedary archive evidence. Comparator material from other camelids does not promote dromedary support automatically.

species_manifest.scientific_scope: Dromedary support is restricted to Camelus dromedarius evidence. Other camelid or broader comparator material does not promote dromedary support.
species_manifest.runtime_scope: Current runtime normalization and reporting remain human AADR-first until species-specific collectors and archive bridges are implemented.

curation_manifest.support_statement: Paper-pinned core domestication support exists for this species. Curated projects are fit for governed comparative use, while pending projects still need stronger archive-paper linkage.

curated_projects.paper_title: Combined hybridization capture and shotgun sequencing for ancient DNA analysis of extinct wild and domestic dromedary camel
curated_projects.notes: Dromedary mitogenome range named on the primary paper page. It supports Camelus dromedarius only, not other camelids.
curated_projects.nordic_relevance_reason: The current curated project inventory does not yet identify a shipped Nordic-localized lead for this record.

refusals.detail: The current non-human program has project-level archive curation, but not enough sample-level raw metadata to emit sample rows honestly.
This project already ships project-level interpretation, but a defensible locality lead has not yet been curated into the species-owned locality artifact.

normalization_bundle.normalization_scope: Non-human normalization currently governs project, study, and curated locality summaries. Sample rows stay empty until archive-backed sample metadata is curated into species-owned raw inputs.
